scenario: 💨 You smell gas in the kitchen. What’s your next big brain move?
A: Light a candle to see better
B: Turn on the fan for fresh air
C: Switch on the light to check
D: Open windows and shut the gas valve

feedback.A: ❌ Kaboom alert. Fire + gas = fireworks. 😂 Nice try, but nope.
feedback.B: ❌ Electric motors can spark. Don’t risk it. 😂
feedback.D: ✅ Fresh air and shutoff = hero move. 😎 Safety never looked this cool.

scenario: 🔥 Your pressure cooker starts making a strange hissing noise. What now?
A: Open it fast before it explodes
C: Turn off the stove and wait for pressure to drop
D: Throw water on it to cool it

feedback.B: ❌ Your mom’s not a bomb squad.
feedback.D: ❌ Water won’t help. Might make it worse!

scenario: ⚡ You see a fallen electric wire on the road after a rainstorm. What do you do?
A: Use a stick to poke it
D: Stay away and call the power company

feedback.D: ✅ Stay safe and alert the pros!

scenario: 🌊 You’re stuck in a flood. What should you avoid doing?
A: Walk through water with power lines nearby

feedback.A: ❌ You vs. electric eel mode? No thanks.

scenario: 🚪 You're trapped in a burning room. What's your escape move?
A: Open the door without checking it
B: Touch door with back of your hand first
C: Break a window and jump from the 5th floor

feedback.A: ❌ Fire surprise on the other side. 🫠
feedback.B: ✅ If it’s hot — don’t open! Genius move.
feedback.C: ❌ Not all heroes fly. Gravity wins.

scenario: 🏹 Your friend gets hit with an arrow during a wild college drama. What should you absolutely NOT do?
A: Pull it out like a movie hero
B: Snap it off and call it a day
C: Leave it in and rush to the ER

feedback.A: ❌ That’ll just unleash more blood. You’re not Robin Hood. 😂 Nice try, but nope.
feedback.B: ❌ A broken arrow is still inside. Bad idea. 😂 Nice try, but nope.
feedback.C: ✅ It’s plugging the wound like a cork. Let the docs handle it! 🏥 😎 Safety never looked this cool.
feedback.D: ❌ You have better things to do right now. Like surviving. 😂 Nice try, but nope.

scenario: 🩸 You cut your hand badly while opening a tin can like a savage. What now?
A: Stuff it with cotton and tape it up
B: Wrap with a clean cloth and elevate
C: Rub turmeric and hope for the best
D: Ignore it because you’re built different

feedback.A: ❌ Cotton sticks and makes a mess. Not ideal. 😂 Nice try, but nope.
feedback.B: ✅ Elevate + wrap = first aid legend 🧠 😎 Safety never looked this cool.
feedback.C: ❌ This isn’t a curry recipe. 😂 Nice try, but nope.
feedback.D: ❌ Built different still needs blood inside. 😂 Nice try, but nope.

scenario: ⚡ You touch a live wire and can’t let go. Why?
B: Muscles contract due to the current
C: You’ve formed an emotional bond with the wire
D: You're being absorbed into the Matrix

feedback.B: ✅ Electricity = muscle lock. Let go? You can’t.

scenario: 🌪️ Caught in a dust storm on a solo ride. What’s your survival mode?
A: Stand and scream into the wind like a Bollywood hero
B: Use your jacket to shield your face and crouch down
C: Run in circles to confuse nature
D: Take your helmet off for better breathing

feedback.A: ❌ Cool in movies, dumb in real life.
feedback.B: ✅ Stay low, breathe slow, survive the show.
feedback.D: ❌ That helmet was your best friend.

scenario: ☠️ You find someone unconscious near a generator inside a closed room. What’s the stealth killer here?

feedback.B: ✅ CO = silent but deadly. 🛑 Ventilate and help.

scenario: ☢️ Your roommate just drank toilet cleaner thinking it was lemonade (don't ask). What’s the worst move?
B: Rush them to hospital — no vomiting
D: Call your ex for moral support

feedback.A: ❌ Acid up + acid down = more burn.
feedback.B: ✅ Straight to the ER. No exit delays. 🏃‍♂️💨
feedback.D: ❌ Your ex can’t cure chemical burns.

scenario: 🔥 Your room is filled with smoke and visibility is 0. What should you *actually* do?
A: Run around waving your hands like Naruto
B: Crawl on the floor to stay under the smoke
C: Stand still and scream until someone finds you
D: Open all the windows at once

feedback.B: ✅ Smoke rises. Air's down low. Get crawling. 🐍
feedback.D: ❌ Oxygen feeds fire. Congrats, you added fuel.

scenario: 🐶 Your cousin gets bitten by a suspicious street dog. What do you do?
B: Wait to see if the dog seems chill
C: Wash thoroughly and rush for a rabies shot
D: Put a band-aid and call it vibes

feedback.C: ✅ Rabies = no second chances. Get that shot! 💉
feedback.D: ❌ You’re not manifesting health, act now.

scenario: 💣 Someone yells 'Bomb!' in a crowded event. What’s your big brain move?
B: Shout louder to warn more people
C: Drop low, avoid bottlenecks, and exit calmly
D: Freeze and hope it’s a prank

scenario: 🌞 Friend faints in the sun after hours of cricket. What’s the *wrong* thing to do?
A: Give them water while they're unconscious
B: Lay them down and elevate their legs
C: Loosen clothing and fan them gently
D: Check if they're breathing and call help

feedback.A: ❌ Don’t pour water into an unconscious person. Choking alert 🚫
feedback.B: ✅ Good move. Keeps blood going to the brain.
feedback.C: ✅ Nice way to cool them down.

scenario: 🪱 You spot a leech stuck to your friend’s leg during a hike. What now?
A: Rip it off with bare hands like a boss
B: Light a match and scare it
C: Sprinkle salt to make it detach
D: Tell it to go away politely

scenario: ⚠️ After a storm, a wire hangs into a puddle on the road. What’s your move?
B: Touch it with a long stick
C: Assume it’s live and stay away

feedback.B: ❌ Electricity travels, sticks won’t protect you.
feedback.C: ✅ Assume it's hot 🔥 and respect the wire.
